channel.title: ThaiCySec - Cybersecurity Blog
channel.description: Recent content on ThaiCySec - Cybersecurity Blog

item.title: Security by Obscurity, by hiding ports, framework or platform name and versions at which extended? Practical or Operational Hell?
item.description: How far should we go hiding versions, frameworks, and platform details from attackers before security hardening becomes operational pain?

item.title: The Cybersecurity Fundamentals That Survive Every Era, Even AI
item.description: Why strong IT and cybersecurity fundamentals still matter more than hype, even in the AI era.
